SEARCH
Package org.apache.arrow.datafusion.execution

Interface VarProvider

public interface VarProvider
A provider of variable values for SQL queries.

Implementations resolve variable references in SQL at execution time. User-defined variables use the @ prefix (e.g., @my_var), while system variables use @@ (e.g., @@version).

The variable name is passed as a list of strings. For simple variables like @name, the list is ["@name"]. For dotted variables like @app.setting, the list is ["@app", "setting"].

Example implementation: 

VarProvider provider = new VarProvider() {
    @Override
    public ScalarValue getValue(List<String> varNames) {
        return switch (varNames.getFirst()) {
            case "@name" -> new ScalarValue.Utf8("Alice");
            case "@count" -> new ScalarValue.Int32(42);
            default -> throw new IllegalArgumentException("Unknown variable: " + varNames);
        };
    }

    @Override
    public Optional<ArrowType> getType(List<String> varNames) {
        return switch (varNames.getFirst()) {
            case "@name" -> Optional.of(ArrowType.Utf8.INSTANCE);
            case "@count" -> Optional.of(new ArrowType.Int(32, true));
            default -> Optional.empty();
        };
    }
};
ctx.registerVariable(VarType.USER_DEFINED, provider, allocator);
DataFrame df = ctx.sql("SELECT @name, @count");

  • Rust DataFusion: VarProvider

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Optional<org.apache.arrow.vector.types.pojo.ArrowType>
    getType(List<String> varNames)
    Returns the data type of the variable identified by the given names.
    ScalarValue
    getValue(List<String> varNames)
    Returns the value of the variable identified by the given names.

  • Method Details

    • getValue

      ScalarValue getValue(List<String> varNames)
      Returns the value of the variable identified by the given names.

      Called during query execution to resolve variable references. The variable name includes the @ or @@ prefix. 

      @Override
public ScalarValue getValue(List<String> varNames) {
    return new ScalarValue.Utf8("hello");
}
      Parameters:
      varNames - the variable name components (e.g., ["@my_var"] or ["@app", "setting"])
      Returns:
      the scalar value for this variable
      Throws:
      RuntimeException - if the variable is unknown or cannot be resolved
      See Also:
      • Rust DataFusion: VarProvider::get_value

    • getType

      Optional<org.apache.arrow.vector.types.pojo.ArrowType> getType(List<String> varNames)
      Returns the data type of the variable identified by the given names.

      Called during query planning to determine the type of a variable reference. Return Optional.empty() if the variable is unknown. 

      @Override
public Optional<ArrowType> getType(List<String> varNames) {
    return Optional.of(ArrowType.Utf8.INSTANCE);
}
      Parameters:
      varNames - the variable name components
      Returns:
      the Arrow type of the variable, or empty if unknown
      See Also:
      • Rust DataFusion: VarProvider::get_type
